questions: What Express routes are defined in raftaar-ai? List each route path, HTTP method, and the handler function it calls. Search the codebase to find all route definitions.
Find all uses of the LedgerService class. Which files import it, and what methods are called on it? Search the codebase for every reference.
Find all Python files in codepulse that define Click CLI commands. List every @cli.command() or @click.command() decorator and the function it decorates. Search the src/codepulse directory.
What is the full list of classes defined in the codepulse codebase? For each class, list its file path and all methods it defines. Search src/codepulse for all class definitions.
Find all exported functions in gin's router.go file. List each function name, its parameters, and what it returns. Read the file and extract every public API.
Trace how gin.HandlerFunc is used throughout the codebase. Find all files that define or reference this type, and list the handler functions that implement it.
Find all public structs defined in tokio/src/runtime/ directory. List each struct name, its file, and the key methods implemented on it.
How does tokio define and use its Task type? Search tokio/src/ for the Task struct definition, all its method implementations, and all places where Task is referenced.
List all Interceptor implementations in the okhttp/ directory. For each interceptor class, state which file it's in and what the intercept() method does.
Find the RealCall class. List all methods defined on it, their file paths, and which other classes call each method.
List all functions defined in lapi.c. For each function, note whether it's exported (starts with lua_) or internal (static). Read the file and extract every function signature.
Find all struct definitions in the Lua source code. List each struct name, which header file it's in, and its key fields.
Find all method definitions in lib/sinatra/base.rb. List each method name and the line number where it's defined. Focus on public methods.
How does Sinatra define its route matching logic? Search the codebase for where HTTP methods (GET, POST, etc.) are handled and routes are matched against incoming requests.
Find all class definitions in the Slim/Src/ directory. List each class name, its namespace, and its parent class (if any).
How does Slim define and register middleware? Search the codebase for middleware-related classes and methods that add or execute middleware.
